scripts.functions:install: npx -y -p node@22 -p npm@10 npm --prefix firebase/functions install
scripts.functions:build: npx -y -p node@22 -p npm@10 npm --prefix firebase/functions run build
scripts.functions:audit: npx -y -p node@22 -p npm@10 npm --prefix firebase/functions audit
scripts.functions:audit:prod: npx -y -p node@22 -p npm@10 npm --prefix firebase/functions audit --audit-level=high
